{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":226},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7241924042826892036","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很精彩的一部悬疑探案类作品，一共有八集，每一集都有若干个小案件，故事情节曲折离奇，对这种探案类小说，最大的乐趣就是跟着情节、跟着作者的笔墨，自己也进行一场头脑风暴，分析案情和凶手到底是谁。当然我常常猜错，但真正的凶手浮出水面之时，我便忍不住拍案叫绝：原来是他啊！藏得这么深！作者岳勇是一个老作者，写过多本作品，文笔凝练老道，每个人物都塑造得很好，值得一读。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1686141959,"group_id":"6855113265534471176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"风格各异，码字百亿，总有一个适合自己😊","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Zb+v320RdVwgNjVNfAKh8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/85244acde9a34dc1ae32a6c01d097582~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623329&x-signature=R1MBpZaLrli2uoPo0%2BHILkJdxBA%3D","user_id":"333845687441864","user_name":"吾之蜜糖花香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"333845687441864","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1741701789,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_info":{"abstract":"染血的利刃，灼热的子弹，永远无法逃离的死亡噩梦。罪案连环，杀机重重，隐藏在背后的真凶究竟是谁？罪恶的双手尚未洗净，监牢的大门已经缓缓开启……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/6de2eec34a9ce2d2c5b9fedf902d17f7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"岳勇","author_id":"","book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_name":"诡案罪（全八册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"70万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7514948569044896830","read_count":"11826","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1222175"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"88","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6de2eec34a9ce2d2c5b9fedf902d17f7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258341&x-signature=J3MeRQZNepIaQLj04MJsGhQpCxg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1949},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7257123425734427455","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超级带感，每个故事短小精悍，不看完猜不到凶手系列。主角是一个刑警，在档案室工作，接触到了很多陈年卷宗，由此故事开篇。其中一个魔术杀人的故事，有点吓人。表演人体拼图时有个人真的被杀了，这个桥段其他故事里也见过，不同的是后续的发展很不一样。抽丝剥茧有逻辑，迅速破案不啰嗦，有点早期故事会的风格，就是单刀直入没啥废话，第一个故事死亡连载也不错，女人死亡场景的特写让人毛骨悚然。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689680844,"group_id":"6855113265534471176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwS9Y9krPcVJLciAWYkuPPTPX6VVkRAbKHGNcUkTFkYJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2940525617098147","user_name":"惊天撼地的古勒比加"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2940525617098147","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_info":{"abstract":"染血的利刃，灼热的子弹，永远无法逃离的死亡噩梦。罪案连环，杀机重重，隐藏在背后的真凶究竟是谁？罪恶的双手尚未洗净，监牢的大门已经缓缓开启……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/6de2eec34a9ce2d2c5b9fedf902d17f7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"岳勇","author_id":"","book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_name":"诡案罪（全八册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"70万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7514948569044896830","read_count":"11826","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1222175"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"88","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6de2eec34a9ce2d2c5b9fedf902d17f7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258341&x-signature=J3MeRQZNepIaQLj04MJsGhQpCxg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":36992},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7455714626193031961","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"《诡案罪》这部小说以一起离奇的命案为引子，讲述了一名年轻的刑警如何通过层层剥茧、抽丝剥茧，最终将真凶绳之以法的故事。这部小说的故事情节跌宕起伏、扣人心弦，人物形象栩栩如生、呼之欲出。作者以其丰富的想象力和精湛的笔触，将读者带入了一个充满悬疑和惊险的世界。
小说的情节设计非常巧妙。作者通过一系列看似无关的事件，逐步揭示出案件背后的真相。在这个过程中，读者会不断产生疑问和猜测，直到最后的真相大白。这种情节设计不仅让读者保持高度的兴趣，也让整个故事更加紧凑和精彩。
作者的人物塑造也非常成功。小说中的主人公是一位年轻的刑警，他聪明、勇敢、正直，有着强烈的使命感和责任感。在故事中，他不仅要面对复杂的案件和危险的罪犯，还要面对内心的挣扎和成长。作者通过对主人公的刻画，展现了一个普通人在面对挑战时的坚韧和勇气，让读者深感敬佩。
小说的语言风格也非常独特。作者的文笔流畅、用词准确，既有文学性又有现场感。在描绘案件和人物形象时，作者运用了大量的细节描写和心理描写，让读者仿佛身临其境。同时，作者还巧妙地运用了一些比喻和象征手法，增强了故事的感染力和艺术性。
《诡案罪》是一部非常优秀的悬疑推理小说。它以精彩的情节、生动的人物和独特的语言风格吸引了众多读者的喜爱。我相信，这部小说不仅能够给读者带来紧张刺激的阅读体验，还能够引发人们对正义和勇气的深刻思考。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735925889,"group_id":"6855113265534471176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"爱情 言情 恐怖 digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":75828,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":2695},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7476440856373822233","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不打算继续看了，感觉逻辑上没有太致命的问题，剧情上里面的故事，有的东西是有雷同的，感觉优缺点都有吧。悬疑推理的推理过程是很重要的，如果没有，真的很减分。
如果你喜欢看悬疑推理小说，书荒没书看了，可以考虑看这本，有更好的选择就不推荐看，或者可以看几个，毕竟都是独立故事，无论是跳过还是弃文都没问题"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1740750408,"group_id":"6855113265534471176","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3949075971189607"}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"84"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":18081,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39779,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7453370305270350617","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我给四星吧，反转比较多，故事比较短，没发现特别大的漏洞，喜欢反转多的可以看一看
悬疑，上帝视角，短故事，几乎没有废话，文字简洁精炼，反转多，脑洞比较大，以犯罪手法为主，其他并没有详细说明，整体风格比较压抑
标签是悬疑推理，基本没有推理，以陈述故事的形式写的小说，如果有人喜欢以破案的角度一步步看怎么破案的，查到什么线索，哪些人可疑……那这本就不推荐看
然后因为每个故事比较短，所以内容不够丰富，人设不够立体，比如作案过程，人物塑造，氛围的渲染……很多东西并没有详细描写和刻画，如果不喜欢这种太笼统的，不建议看
以上是我看到四十章的个人感受，也就是百分之三十七，具体的我看完了追评"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1735378102,"group_id":"6855113265534471176","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢烧脑剧情向的书，看书很细，看不懂会反复看，对书要求很高","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxadp20st7STP2sbOl97bOo+3lpRbY5O+BQTo7Y9pBYe","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1c7386b2d70c4d76b3f2bdee28a3482c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776621288&x-signature=kUYaqiS3E%2FAtdYW9kqV84eFVH6w%3D","user_id":"3949075971189607","user_name":"奶蝶加冰"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3949075971189607","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_info":{"abstract":"染血的利刃，灼热的子弹，永远无法逃离的死亡噩梦。罪案连环，杀机重重，隐藏在背后的真凶究竟是谁？罪恶的双手尚未洗净，监牢的大门已经缓缓开启……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/6de2eec34a9ce2d2c5b9fedf902d17f7~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"岳勇","author_id":"","book_id":"6855113265534471176","book_name":"诡案罪（全八册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202018","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"70万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7514948569044896830","read_count":"11826","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1222175"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"88","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/6de2eec34a9ce2d2c5b
